questionnaires.title: Fatigue Self - Assessment Scale - 14 (Fatigue Scale - 14, FS - 14)

components.content: Please ask the subject to choose 'Yes' or 'No' according to whether the question content matches the actual situation. Please answer the questions one by one.
1. Have you ever been troubled by fatigue?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 2. Do you need more rest?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 3. Do you feel drowsy or sleepy?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 4. Do you find it difficult to start doing things?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 5. You don't find it difficult to start doing things, but do you feel exhausted when you continue?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 6. Do you feel short of physical strength?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 7. Do you feel that your muscle strength has decreased compared with before?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 8. Do you feel weak?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 9. Do you have difficulty concentrating?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 10. Is your mind as clear and agile as usual when thinking about problems?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 11. Do you have trouble speaking smoothly?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 12. Do you find it difficult to find a suitable word when speaking?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 13. Is your memory as good as usual now?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: 14. Do you still like doing the things you used to do?
components.label: Fatigue

components.content: Please answer the following questions and choose the option that best describes your feelings and behaviors in the past six months:
Part A
1. After completing the challenging part of a task, do you often have difficulty with the final details?
2. When performing a task that requires organization, do you often have difficulty keeping things in order?
3. Do you often forget appointments or things that you have to do?
4. When you need to complete a mentally demanding task, do you often avoid or postpone it?
5. When you have to sit for a long time, do you often feel restless with your hands and feet?
6. Do you often feel extremely active and have to complete certain things, as if driven by a motor?
Part B
7. Do you often make careless mistakes when doing boring or difficult work?
8. Do you often have difficulty staying focused when doing boring or repetitive work?
9. Do you often have difficulty focusing on what others are saying even when they are talking to you face - to - face?
10. Do you often misplace or lose things at home or at work?
11. Do you often get distracted by the activities and noises around you?
12. Do you often leave your seat in meetings or other situations where you need to maintain a sitting position?
13. Do you often feel irritable?
14. Do you often feel unable to calm down and relax in your leisure time?
15. Do you often feel that you talk a lot in social situations?
16. Do you often interrupt others during a conversation?
17. Do you often feel impatient when waiting in line to do something?
18. Do you often disturb others when they are busy?

questionnaires.title: Attentional Control Scale (Attentional Control Scale, ACS)

components.content: Hello, the following sentences describe attention. There are 20 questions in total. Please read each question carefully and then choose an answer that best suits your situation. 1 = Almost never, 2 = Sometimes, 3 = Often, 4 = Always
1. When there is noise around, I find it difficult to concentrate on a difficult task.
components.label: ACS_1

components.content: 2. When I need to concentrate on solving a problem, I find it difficult to focus.
components.label: ACS_2

components.content: 3. When I'm trying to do something, things around me can still distract me.
components.label: ACS_3

components.content: 4. Even if there is music playing in the room around me, I can still concentrate very well.
components.label: ACS_4

components.content: 5. When I'm fully concentrated, I can focus so much that I'm not aware of what's going on around me.
components.label: ACS_5

components.content: 6. When I'm reading and studying, if someone is talking in the room, I'm easily distracted.
components.label: ACS_6

components.content: 7. When I'm trying to concentrate on something, I have difficulty preventing distracting thoughts.
components.label: ACS_7

components.content: 8. When I'm excited, I find it difficult to concentrate.
components.label: ACS_8

components.content: 9. When I'm fully concentrated, I ignore the feeling of hunger and thirst.
components.label: ACS_9

components.content: 10. I can quickly switch from one task to another.
components.label: ACS_10

components.content: 11. It takes me some time to really get involved in a new task.
components.label: ACS_11

components.content: 12. When taking notes in class, I find it difficult to coordinate my attention between writing and listening.
components.label: ACS_12

components.content: 13. If I need to, I'll quickly become interested in a new topic.
components.label: ACS_13

components.content: 14. It's easy for me to read or write while on the phone.
components.label: ACS_14

components.content: 15. I find it difficult to have two conversations at the same time.
components.label: ACS_15

components.content: 16. I find it difficult to quickly come up with a new idea.
components.label: ACS_16

components.content: 17. After being interrupted or distracted, I can easily turn my attention back to what I was doing before.
components.label: ACS_17

components.content: 18. When a distracting thought comes into my mind, I can easily shift my attention away from it.
components.label: ACS_18

components.content: 19. It's easy for me to alternate between two different tasks.
components.label: ACS_19

components.content: 20. It's difficult for me to break a way of thinking and look at it from another angle.
components.label: ACS_20

variables.name: ACS_Total
variables.calculation: (5 - sum[ACS_1])+(5 - sum[ACS_2])+(5 - sum[ACS_3])+sum[ACS_4]+sum[ACS_5]+(5 - sum[ACS_6])+(5 - sum[ACS_7])+(5 - sum[ACS_8])+sum[ACS_9]+sum[ACS_10]+(5 - sum[ACS_11])+(5 - sum[ACS_12])+sum[ACS_13]+sum[ACS_14]+(5 - sum[ACS_15])+(5 - sum[ACS_16])+sum[ACS_17]+sum[ACS_18]+sum[ACS_19]+(5 - sum[ACS_20])
